input.prompt: ### The 'FinMoveMoney' tool completed successfully with {'error': 'Activity task failed', 'tool': 'FinMoveMoney'}. INSTRUCTIONS: Parse this tool result as plain text, and use the system prompt containing the list of tools in sequence and the conversation history (and previous tool_results) to figure out next steps, if any. You will need to use the tool_results to auto-fill arguments for subsequent tools and also to figure out if all tools have been run. {"next": "<question|confirm|pick-new-goal|done>", "tool": "<tool_name or null>", "args": {"<arg1>": "<value1 or null>", "<arg2>": "<value2 or null>}, "response": "<plain text (can include \n line breaks)>"}ONLY return those json keys (next, tool, args, response), nothing else. Next should be "question" if the tool is not the last one in the sequence. Next should be "done" if the user is asking to be done with the chat. Next should only be "pick-new-goal" if EVERY SINGLE STEP in the Goal description has been completed (check the system prompt Goal section carefully), or the user explicitly requested to pick a new goal. If any step is missing (like customer creation, invoice creation, or payment processing), continue with the next required tool.

output.response: It seems there was an error processing the money movement: 'Activity task failed'. Please try again or contact support for further assistance.
